meta.mainSkillsNote: valuesByLevel and activations contain exact in-game values from the Neroli's Lab dataset. relativeCurve is valuesByLevel normalized to level 1 (falls back to RP curve for skills without numeric amounts, e.g. Metronome).

Helping Bonus._note: MANUALLY ADDED 2026-07-04 - missing from the original hand-made list. Reduces helping time of all team members by 5%. Tier S per community tier lists.

Mew._note: MANUALLY ADDED 2026-07-04, not from Neroli's Lab source - Mew is missing from that dataset. Stats sourced from Serebii/Game8 (type, berry, baseFrequency 48m20s, carryLimitBase 26, specialty All). ingredientPercent/skillPercent are COPIED FROM DARKRAI as a placeholder since Mew's exact percentages are not publicly documented (they vary per-player via Eureka Seed customization) - treat these two numbers as approximate.

Greengrass Isle (Expert Mode).note: Unlocked at Snorlax Master 18. Berries are NOT fixed - each week 1 main favorite + 2 sub favorites are drawn from all 18 berries, plus one random bonus (ingredient/berry/skill). Configure this in the Team tab.

Berry Burst.description: Gets 11 Berries plus 1 of each of the Berries other Pokémon on your team collect.

Disguise (Berry Burst).description: Gets 8 Berries plus 1 of each of the Berries other Pokémon on your team collect. May activate Greater Success once a day.

Draco Meteor (Berry Burst).description: Gets the Berries the Pokémon on your team (including itself) collect. Meet certain conditions to boost effect.

Moonlight (Charge Energy S).description: Restores 12 Energy to the user. Has a chance of restoring 6.3 energy to another Pokémon.

Bad Dreams (Charge Strength M).description: Increases Snorlax's Strength by 2640, but at the same time, reduces the Energy of helper Pokémon on your team that aren't Dark type by 12.

Charge Strength S Range.description: Increases Snorlax's Strength on average by 500.

Stockpile (Charge Strength S).description: Stockpile or Spit Up is selected. When Spit Up triggers, Snorlax gains Strength from Stockpile's number.

Cooking Assist S.description: Gets you 6 ingredients chosen at random.

Bulk Up (Cooking Assist S).description: Gets you 6 ingredients chosen at random. Also raises your Extra Tasty rate by 1%. The effect lasts until you cook an Extra Tasty dish or change sites.

Cooking Power-Up S.description: Increases the quantity of Cooking items you get by 7.

Minus (Cooking Power-Up S).description: Gives your cooking pot room for 5 more ingredients next time you cook. Meet certain conditions to also restore 8 Energy to one random Pokémon on your team.

Energizing Cheer S.description: Restores 12 Energy to one random Pokémon on your team.

Heal Pulse (Energizing Cheer S).description: Restores 6 Energy to two random Pokémon on your team and instantly gets you ×1 the usual help from those Pokémon. Meet certain conditions to boost effect.

Nuzzle (Energizing Cheer S).description: Restores 9 Energy to one random Pokémon on your team. If you're lucky, that Pokémon will also gain a main skill activation bonus.

Energy For Everyone S.description: Restores 5 Energy to each helper Pokémon on your team.

Berry Juice (Energy For Everyone S).description: Restores 5 Energy to all helper Pokémon on your team. Sometimes additionally gets you a Berry Juice.

Lunar Blessing (Energy For Everyone S).description: Restores 3 Energy to all helper Pokémon on your team plus gives 1 - 14 of each of the Berries other Pokémon on your team collect.

Extra Helpful S.description: Instantly gets you ×6 the usual help from a helper Pokémon.

Helper Boost.description: Instantly gets you ×2 the usual help from all Pokémon on your team. Meet certain conditions to boost effect.

Ingredient Draw S.description: Gets 5 of one type of ingredient chosen randomly from a specific selection of ingredients.

Hyper Cutter (Ingredient Draw S).description: Gets 5 of one type of ingredient chosen randomly from a specific selection of ingredients. Sometimes gets an additional 5 ingredients.

Super Luck (Ingredient Draw S).description: Gets 5 of one type of ingredient chosen randomly from a specific selection of ingredients. On rare occasions, gets a great number of Dream Shards instead.

Ingredient Magnet S.description: Gets you 6 ingredients chosen at random.

Plus (Ingredient Magnet S).description:
Gets you 5 ingredients chosen at random. 
    Meet certain conditions to get an additional 0 undefineds

Present (Ingredient Magnet S).description: Gets you 4 ingredients chosen at random. Sometimes gets an additional 4 candy for one Pokémon on your team.

Skill Copy.description: Copies and performs the main skill of one randomly selected Pokémon on the team.

Mimic (Skill Copy).description: Copies and performs the main skill of one randomly selected Pokémon on the team.

Transform (Skill Copy).description: Copies and performs the main skill of one randomly selected Pokémon on the team.

Metronome.description: Uses one randomly chosen main skill.

Tasty Chance S.description: Raises your Extra Tasty rate by 4%. The effect lasts until you cook an Extra Tasty dish or change sites.

Versatile.description: Can activate one of any Main Skill at random. Also gets candy for one team member.
Versatile._note: MANUALLY ADDED 2026-07-04 - Versatile is Mew's unique signature skill (randomly activates another Pokemon's main skill), not in Neroli's Lab source. RP curve copied from Charge Strength M as a rough placeholder since Versatile has no fixed "amount" of its own - the scoring app will treat its power as this approximate curve.
